Metadata.siteDescription: Oryva helps businesses generate more customers through web development, SEO, digital marketing, and AI automation.
Metadata.servicesDescription: Explore Oryva's full suite of digital growth services: website development, SEO, digital marketing, and AI automation.
Metadata.aboutDescription: Learn about Oryva — a digital growth agency founded to help businesses compete and win in the digital age.
Metadata.contactDescription: Get in touch with Oryva. Book a free consultation and let's discuss how we can help grow your business.

Footer.tagline: We help businesses generate more customers through web development, SEO, marketing, and AI automation.
Footer.builtWith: Built by Oryva · Designed for Growth

Hero.sub: We help businesses generate more customers through websites, SEO, marketing, and AI automation.

ServicesOverview.label: What We Do
ServicesOverview.title: Everything you need to grow online
ServicesOverview.description: From your first website to full-scale growth campaigns — we cover every digital channel that matters.
ServicesOverview.webDevDesc: High-performance websites and web apps built with modern tech. Fast, mobile-first, and optimized for conversions.
ServicesOverview.seoDesc: Dominate search rankings with technical SEO, content strategy, and link building that drives qualified organic traffic.
ServicesOverview.marketingDesc: Data-driven paid ads, social media, and email campaigns that convert prospects into loyal customers.
ServicesOverview.aiDesc: Intelligent automation for lead nurturing, customer support, and business workflows. Work smarter, not harder.

WhyChoose.label: Why Oryva
WhyChoose.title: An agency that thinks like a founder
WhyChoose.description: We've been in your shoes. We build growth systems we'd want for our own businesses.
WhyChoose.resultsDesc: We measure success in revenue and qualified leads — never vanity metrics or empty promises.
WhyChoose.dataDesc: Every strategy is backed by analytics. We track what works and double down on it.
WhyChoose.fullStackDesc: Design, development, SEO, ads, and AI — all under one roof. No juggling multiple vendors.
WhyChoose.transparentDesc: Weekly reports, open Slack channels, and no surprises. You're always in the loop.
WhyChoose.fastDesc: Websites live in days, campaigns running in weeks. We move at startup speed.
WhyChoose.partnershipDesc: We build relationships, not transactions. Your growth is our ongoing responsibility.

Industries.label: Industries We Serve
Industries.title: Deep expertise across high-trust sectors
Industries.description: We understand the unique challenges of competitive, trust-driven industries — and we know how to win in them.
Industries.realEstateDesc: Generate qualified buyer and seller leads with high-converting property websites and targeted ad campaigns.
Industries.healthcareDesc: Build patient trust, improve online reputation, and grow your practice with compliant digital marketing.
Industries.legalDesc: Attract high-value clients and establish legal authority with SEO and a professional digital presence.
Industries.accountingDesc: Build credibility, generate referrals, and automate client onboarding with smart digital systems.

Process.label: How We Work
Process.title: Simple process, powerful results
Process.description: Four focused steps from first call to measurable growth. No bureaucracy, no long contracts.
Process.discoveryDesc: We deep-dive into your business, goals, target audience, and competitive landscape to uncover your biggest growth opportunities.
Process.strategyDesc: We build a custom growth roadmap — the right channels, messaging, and tactics for your specific industry and stage.
Process.executionDesc: We move fast. Websites, campaigns, and automations are built and launched with precision and no bloated timelines.
Process.growthDesc: We monitor, test, and optimize continuously. What works gets scaled. What doesn't gets replaced. Always improving.

CTA.label: Ready to grow?
CTA.title: Let's build your growth engine together
CTA.description: Book a free 30-minute consultation. We'll audit your digital presence and outline a clear path to more customers.
CTA.note: No commitment required · Free 30-min strategy call

ServicesPage.heroDesc: A comprehensive suite of digital services — from first impression to returning customers. Everything you need to win online, under one roof.
ServicesPage.notSureTitle: Not sure which service you need?
ServicesPage.notSureDesc: Book a free consultation and we'll audit your digital presence and recommend the best path forward.
ServicesPage.webDevTagline: Your digital foundation, built for growth.
ServicesPage.webDevDesc: We build fast, conversion-optimized websites and web apps using modern technology. Every project is mobile-first, SEO-ready, and built to scale with your business.
ServicesPage.seoTagline: Rank higher. Get found. Stay ahead.
ServicesPage.seoDesc: We help businesses dominate search rankings through proven technical SEO, strategic content, and authoritative link building. Our campaigns deliver qualified, organic traffic that converts.
ServicesPage.marketingTagline: Reach the right people at the right moment.
ServicesPage.marketingDesc: From paid ads to social media and email campaigns, we design and run data-driven marketing that consistently converts prospects into paying customers.
ServicesPage.aiTagline: Scale your business without scaling your team.
ServicesPage.aiDesc: We implement intelligent automations that handle repetitive tasks, nurture leads, and delight customers 24/7. Work smarter and free your team for what truly matters.

AboutPage.heroDesc: Oryva was founded with a clear mission: make powerful digital growth tools accessible to every business — not just the ones with massive budgets.
AboutPage.storyP1: We started Oryva because we saw too many businesses pouring money into digital marketing with little to show for it — agencies collecting retainers while clients waited months for results.
AboutPage.storyP2: We take a different approach. We move fast, focus on what actually drives revenue, and treat every client's business as if it were our own.
AboutPage.storyP3: From solo consultants to growing SMBs, we help businesses at every stage get more visibility, more leads, and more customers through smart digital strategy and relentless execution.
AboutPage.missionQuote: "Make the digital tools that help businesses grow accessible to every founder — regardless of size or budget."
AboutPage.resultsDesc: Every decision we make is measured against one question: does this bring our client more customers? We don't optimize for impressions — we optimize for revenue.
AboutPage.transparencyDesc: You'll always know what we're doing, why, and what it's achieving. Clear reporting, open communication, no smoke and mirrors.
AboutPage.partnershipDesc: We work best as an extension of your team, not a one-time vendor. The best results come from deep understanding built over time.
AboutPage.speedDesc: We move fast without sacrificing quality. Rapid iteration, smart testing, and relentless execution separate good agencies from great ones.
AboutPage.ctaDesc: We're selective about the clients we work with, because we only take on projects where we're confident we can make a real difference.

ContactPage.heroDesc: Tell us about your business and goals. We'll come back with a clear plan for how we can help.
ContactPage.notReadyDesc: That's totally fine. Just fill out the form and tell us where you're at. No sales pressure, ever.
ContactPage.formDesc: Fill in the form below and we'll be in touch within 24 hours.
